hero.heading: Build It. Ship It.
hero.description: From a single AI assistant to a full autonomous company — CapiBot gives you 36 built-in tools, 8 skill packs, and complete control over how much autonomy your agents get. Private. Secure. Yours.

aiCompany.heading: From assistant to autonomous company
aiCompany.subheading: Start simple with a personal AI chat, scale up to a multi-agent team, or launch a fully autonomous AI company — all on one platform.

useCases.title: Personal AI Assistant
useCases.description: Connect Telegram or WhatsApp and chat with a single agent. Schedule tasks, search the web, manage your calendar.

useCases.title: Multi-Agent Squad
useCases.description: Assemble a team of specialists — developers, researchers, writers — and let them collaborate on projects.

useCases.title: Autonomous AI Company
useCases.description: A CEO agent drafts a business plan, hires a team, creates tasks, and executes — with human oversight when you want it.

features.title: Real-time Live Feed
features.description: Watch agent activity as it happens — tool calls, messages, task updates, and system events stream in real time.

features.title: Smart Notifications

features.title: Cron Scheduler
features.description: Schedule recurring agent tasks with cron expressions. Visual builder and execution history.

features.description: Configure incoming and outgoing webhooks. Connect external services to trigger agent workflows.

features.title: Advanced Config
features.description: Fine-tune provider priorities, model selection, tool permissions, and system-wide settings.

tools.heading: 28+ tools at your agents' fingertips

skills.heading: Thousands of apps. A growing skill library.
skills.subheading: Connect your agents to the tools you already use via Composio, and teach them new capabilities with community skills.
skills.composioDesc: Thousands of apps via unified API. List, discover, and execute actions from any conversation.
skills.skillsDesc: Agents learn new capabilities from Markdown skill files — no code changes needed. Access tens of thousands of community-contributed skills, or create your own.

memory.heading: Your AI remembers everything
memory.subheading: Persistent knowledge that grows smarter with every conversation. Powered by PostgreSQL and pgvector.

features.title: Conversation History
features.description: Every message, tool call, and response is stored and searchable. Full context for every interaction.

features.title: Semantic Search
features.description: Find relevant memories by meaning, not just keywords. Powered by pgvector embeddings via Ollama.

features.title: SOUL.md & USER.md
features.description: Persistent personality and user preference files that shape how your agent thinks and responds.

features.title: Shared Memory
features.description: Agents share a virtualized memory space backed by PostgreSQL. Knowledge flows across sessions.

providers.heading: Choose your LLM. Or choose them all.

providers.configDesc: Set your preferred provider order. If one fails, CapiBot instantly switches to the next. Per-agent model override supported.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about CapiBot.

items.a: CapiBot is an open-source AI agent orchestration platform. It lets you run 150+ specialized AI agents that can collaborate, execute tasks, and even form autonomous companies — all self-hosted on your own infrastructure.
The core platform is open source and free forever. You can self-host it on your own hardware. We offer paid managed hosting (Pro) and enterprise plans for teams who want a hands-off experience.

items.q: What LLM providers does CapiBot support?
items.a: CapiBot supports Anthropic, Google Gemini, Ollama (local), Kimi (Moonshot), GLM, and MiniMax. You can configure priority order and automatic failover between providers.

items.q: Can I run it fully locally?
items.a: Yes. Pair CapiBot with Ollama and a local model, and everything runs on your machine — no data ever leaves your network. PostgreSQL is the only infrastructure requirement.
AI Companies are CapiBot's flagship feature. A CEO agent drafts a business plan, hires specialist agents, creates tasks, and executes — with configurable human oversight at every step.
In managed mode, all CEO-created tasks require human approval before execution. You can approve plans, hiring decisions, and budgets. Or switch to fully autonomous mode when you're confident.
Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack, and a built-in web chat in Mission Control. Each channel supports rich messages, media, and voice transcription where applicable.
Completely. CapiBot is self-hosted — your data stays on your infrastructure. There's no telemetry, no data collection, and no vendor lock-in. You own everything.

items.q: How do I connect external apps?
items.a: Through Composio, which provides access to thousands of apps via a unified API. You can also write custom skills as Markdown files — no code changes needed.
We're in pre-launch. Join the waitlist to get early access, product updates, and founding member pricing locked in forever.

openClaw.heading: CapiBot vs OpenClaw
openClaw.description: Both are open-source AI agent platforms. But CapiBot was built to solve the problems OpenClaw users keep running into: security vulnerabilities, runaway costs, no team management, and no real human oversight.

shortVersion.title: Security First
shortVersion.desc: CapiBot blocks 80+ dangerous shell patterns by default. OpenClaw runs arbitrary code with no guardrails.

shortVersion.title: Team Management
shortVersion.desc: CapiBot has 150 agents organized in a hierarchy with roles, tiers, and categories. OpenClaw has a flat agent model.

shortVersion.title: Human Oversight
shortVersion.desc: CapiBot's managed mode requires approval for plans, hiring, and budgets. OpenClaw has no built-in approval workflow.

openClaw.whySubtitle: Six areas where CapiBot goes beyond what OpenClaw offers.

advantages.title: Security & Sandboxing
advantages.description: 80+ blocked shell patterns, API key guards, audit trails, and HMAC webhook verification out of the box.

advantages.title: Agent Hierarchy
advantages.description: CEOs, specialists, and interns across 12+ categories — not a flat list of interchangeable bots.

advantages.title: AI Companies
advantages.description: Full company lifecycle: briefing, planning, approval, and operating — with human oversight at every gate.

advantages.title: Mission Control
advantages.description: A 28-panel professional dashboard vs. a basic chat interface. Real observability and management.

advantages.title: Multi-Provider Failover
advantages.description: Automatic failover across 6 LLM providers with configurable priority and per-agent model overrides.

advantages.title: Memory & Knowledge
advantages.description: Persistent semantic memory with pgvector, SOUL.md personalities, and shared knowledge bases.

openClaw.comparisonSubtitle: A detailed look at what each platform offers.
forYouItems: You want AI agents that actually work as a team, not isolated chatbots
Security matters — you need sandboxing, audit trails, and access control
You want human oversight without micromanaging every action
You need a real dashboard, not just a chat window
You want to self-host and own your data completely
You need multi-provider LLM support with automatic failover
You want an open-source core with no vendor lock-in
openClaw.ctaDesc: Join the waitlist for early access and founding member pricing. CapiBot is launching soon.
